overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player character walks along wet streets under elevated highways, past holographic billboards and street vendors, with moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, observing the street traffic and neon billboards

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera on the sidewalk wearing casual street clothes

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure spanning across the street above
large digital billboard displaying 'El Guapo' watch advertisement with a skull image
metal scaffolding along the building facade with construction barriers
rain-slicked pavement reflecting the neon lights from surrounding signs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking beneath a massive elevated highway overpass in a futuristic city. The 'El Guapo' billboard is visible ahead on the right, while scaffolding lines the left side of the walkway. The wet pavement reflects the artificial lighting, and a few pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

events.description: traffic light changes to green, allowing vehicles to move through the intersection
ego crosses the multi-lane street and steps onto the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: navigating across the wide intersection while monitoring the traffic flow and signal changes

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sedan driving through the green light at the intersection

entered.detail: zebra-striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on the asphalt
tall pole with traffic signals showing green for vehicles
large illuminated advertisement screen with bright yellow backlighting

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an open urban intersection as the camera crosses the street. The traffic light changes to green, allowing a black sedan to pass through. The elevated highway remains visible in the distance to the left, while new digital billboards appear on the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown sidewalk with holographic advertisements

events.description: pedestrian density increases significantly as ego enters a busier commercial zone

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk past various pedestrians and illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with visible cybernetic arm enhancements walking alongside the street

entered.detail: digital advertisement billboard displaying 'Shouts & Whispers' text with pink neon accents
concrete wall covered in graffiti art featuring a large red rose and letter V
tall palm tree lining the sidewalk against the building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking along a busier commercial sidewalk, the camera passes by a wall with prominent graffiti art featuring a red rose. The 'Shouts & Whispers' billboard dominates the left side of the view, while palm trees line the right side. The crowd density increases with more pedestrians sharing the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark covered walkway under building overpass

events.description: entering a significantly darker covered area with reduced ambient lighting and heavy shadows
approaching a street vendor stall with illuminated green neon signage becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking into a darker covered section of the street with fewer pedestrians around

entered.detail: enclosed walkway beneath a massive building structure with heavy shadows
large vertical digital billboard displaying 'CANT BREATHE' text with a skull graphic
food vendor stall with umbrella and illuminated signage visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The environment becomes significantly darker as the camera enters a covered walkway beneath a building overpass. A prominent 'CANT BREATHE' billboard with a skull graphic appears ahead, creating a dystopian atmosphere. The street vendor cart becomes visible in the distance on the left, marked by its green neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food vendor area with bright neon signage

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing a street food vendor with a bright green neon open sign

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the food cart preparing items for sale

entered.detail: bright green neon sign reading 'OPEN' hanging above the vendor stall
black umbrella awning covering the food preparation area

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on a street food vendor stall illuminated by a vibrant green neon 'OPEN' sign. The vendor stands behind the cart under a black awning, with food preparation equipment visible. The surrounding area is dimly lit, with the neon sign providing the primary light source as the camera approaches the stall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit futuristic city, moving from a wide urban overpass into a dimly lit, claustrophobic alleyway. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway where wet pavement reflects the glow of an El Guapo billboard and scaffolding lines the path. As the camera crosses an open intersection and passes a black sedan, the scene shifts toward a busier commercial sidewalk featuring graffiti of a red rose and the towering Shouts & Whispers billboard. The environment then grows significantly darker as the camera enters a covered walkway beneath a building, passing a dystopian skull graphic before spotting a distant green glow. Finally, the view closes in on a street food vendor stall, where the surrounding shadows are pierced by the vibrant green neon of an open sign.
